title: viola × cebennensis
intro: Viola × cebennensis, also known as Cebennensis pansy or Alpine pansy, is a hybrid plant species in the Violet family (Violaceae), derived from the cross between Viola alpina and Viola lactea. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving stress, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Viola × cebennensis, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and take advantage of its health benefits.
